introSection: Crazy Caterpillar is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently owned and travelled by UK showman David Irvin Jnr.

sections.title: History
sections.content: This roller coaster was present at Dreamland Margate in May 2005. It operated at Atlantis Family Amusement Park in Scarborough, North Yorkshire in 2007 and at Primrose Valley Holiday Park in 2008. From 2009 to 2011, the ride operated at Golden Sands Holiday Park.

fullText:
Crazy Caterpillar is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer DAL Amusement Rides currently owned and travelled by UK showman David Irvin Jnr.

This roller coaster was present at Dreamland Margate in May 2005. It operated at Atlantis Family Amusement Park in Scarborough, North Yorkshire in 2007 and at Primrose Valley Holiday Park in 2008. From 2009 to 2011, the ride operated at Golden Sands Holiday Park.
